system: Brian & Co Master Brand Image + Tone Protection
rule: All background images, product images, supplier images, text, descriptions, UI copy, chatbot copy, email copy, captions, alt text, onboarding text, and any customer-facing or internal-facing wording must be refined to Brian & Co tone and protected brand standards before publishing.
image_rules: Remove or refine backgrounds where appropriate
Match Brian & Co luxury gradient and visual tone
Founder approval before publishing high-risk images
text_rules: Rewrite descriptions in Brian & Co tone
Use preferred name when known and permitted
Keep tone human, warm, refined, clear, and trustworthy
Include origin, condition, authenticity, warranty, return, and provenance details where applicable
tone: trusted friend, knowledgeable, dependable, respectful of boundaries, human, refined, eloquent, premium, non-pushy
